name: I'm on a small island
hints: Western part of the small island with a shovel lying on the ground.
GET SHOVEL - essential for digging up buried treasure on the beach island and grassy plain.
Take the shovel. DIG in various outdoor locations to find buried items. Go EAST to return to the skeleton area.
notes: Western beach of the small island with a shovel. The shovel is essential for digging up buried treasure in the jungle areas (rooms 9, 10) and grassy plain (room 32). East returns to the skeleton area (room 13).
